title: dicranopteris volubilis
intro: Dicranopteris volubilis, also known as climbing fern or shui mu, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dicranopteris volubilis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Dicranopteris volubilis include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
